Label: User Logic File Name
Tooltip: Path to a custom logic file.

Label: Close Cows
Tooltip: When playing Epona's Song for a group of cows, the closest cow will respond, instead of the default behavior.

Label: Arrow Cycling
Tooltip: Cycle through arrow types when pressing R while an arrow is out when using the bow.

Label: Crit Wiggle Disable
Tooltip: Disable crit wiggle movement modification when 1 heart of health or less.

Label: Hash Icons .png
Tooltip: Draw hash icons on the File Select screen.

Label: Elegy Speedup
Tooltip: Applies various Elegy of Emptiness speedups.

Label: Fast Push
Tooltip: Increase the speed of pushing and pulling blocks and faucets.

Label: Trap Quirks
Tooltip: Ice traps will behave slightly differently from other items in certain situations.

Label: Update World Models
Tooltip: Show world models as their actual item instead of the original item. This includes Pieces of Heart, Heart Containers, Skulltula Tokens, Stray Fairies, Moon's Tear and the Seahorse.

Label: Ocarina Underwater
Tooltip: Enable using the ocarina underwater.

Label: Quest Item Storage
Tooltip: Enable Quest Item Storage, which allows for storing multiple quest items in their dedicated inventory slot. Quest items will also always be consumed when used.

Label: Continuous Deku Hopping
Tooltip: Press A while hopping across water to keep hopping.

Label: Iron Goron
Tooltip: Goron Link will sink in water instead of drowning.

Label: Update Shop Appearance
Tooltip: Shops models and text will be updated to match the item they give.

Label: Progressive Upgrades
Tooltip: Enable swords, wallets, magic, bomb bags, quivers and the Goron Lullaby to be found in the intended order.

Label: Target Health Bar
Tooltip: Targeting an enemy shows their health bar.

Label: Climb Most Surfaces
Tooltip: Link can climb most surfaces.

Label: Free Scarecrow
Tooltip: Spawn scarecrow automatically when using ocarina if within range.

Label: Fill Wallet
Tooltip: Fills wallet with max rupees upon finding a wallet upgrade.

Label: Auto Invert
Tooltip: Auto-invert time at the start of a cycle.

Label: Giant Mask Anywhere
Tooltip: Allows the Giant's Mask to be used anywhere with a high enough (or no) ceiling.

Label: Double Archery Rewards
Tooltip: Grant both archery rewards with a sufficient score.

Label: Hidden Rupees Sparkle
Tooltip: Hit Tags and Invisible Rupees will emit a sparkle.

Label: Chest Game Minimap
Tooltip:
Draws a minimap during the Treasure Chest Game if you have the Map of Clock Town:

 - Off: No minimap, default vanilla behaviour.
 - Minimal: Minimap is displayed, blocks appear on minimap when triggered.
 - Conditional Spoiler: Minimal behaviour, and if the Mask of Truth is aquired along with Map of Clock Town, spoil the maze layout.
 - Spoiler: Only Map of Clock Town needed to spoil the maze layout.

Label: Safer Glitches
Tooltip:
Makes it safer to use glitches:
 - Prevents HESS crash
 - Prevents Weirdshot crash
 - Prevents Action Swap crash
 - Prevents Song of Double Time softlock during 0th or 4th day
 - Prevents Tatl text softlock on 0th of 4th day
 - Prevents 0th day file deletion
 - Prevents hookslide crash
 - Prevents softlocks when using Remote Hookshot
 - Prevents 0th day Goron Bow crash
 - Applies safety fixes for Fierce Deity even if Fierce Deity Anywhere is not enabled
 - Index warp no longer crashes or softlocks (but you won't be able to use it to access the Debug Menu)
 - Prevents softlocks when interrupting mask transformations
 - Mayor is removed on 4th day
 - Deku Playground Employees are removed on 4th day
 - Prevents Gossip Stone time from crashing on 4th day
 - Prevents Town Shooting Gallery from crashing on 0th day and 4th day

Label: Bombchu Drops
Tooltip: If you have found Bombchu, then any random Bomb drop or fixed non-randomized Bomb drop will have a chance to drop Bombchu instead. Where relevant, Bombchu packs of 1 and 5 will be in logic in addition to packs of 10.

Label: Instant Transform
Tooltip: Transforming using Deku Mask, Goron Mask, Zora Mask and Fierce Deity's Mask will be almost instant. These items can no longer be used as "cutscene items".

Label: Bomb Arrows
Tooltip: Use a bomb while an arrow is out when using the bow to attach the bomb to the tip of the arrow.

Label: Fewer Health Drops
Tooltip: Recovery Hearts will not drop, and re-acquiring random items will turn into Green Rupees instead. Fairies will not heal except on death.

Label: Easy Frame By Frame
Tooltip: Hold Start while unpausing to pause again after one frame passes.

Label: Fairy Mask Shimmer
Tooltip: Nearby stray fairies, even randomized ones, will cause the Great Fairy Mask to shimmer.

Label: Skulltula Token Sounds
Tooltip: Nearby skulltula tokens, even randomized ones, will emit a spider crawling sound.

Label: Take Damage On Epona
Tooltip: Instead of being immune to damage while riding Epona, Link will take damage and be thrown off.

Label: Take Damage While Shielding
Tooltip: Link will take damage when being hit on his shield, and can't recoil off damage to the shield.

Label: Take Damage From Void
Tooltip: Link will take damage when falling into voids or voiding out in water.

Label: Take Damage From Dog
Tooltip: Dogs will damage Deku Link.

Label: Take Damage From Gorons
Tooltip: Link will take damage when being hit by Gorons during the Goron Race.

Label: Take Damage Getting Caught
Tooltip: Getting thrown out after being caught by guards will deal damage. Being thrown out after getting the reward from the Imprisoned Monkey will not deal damage.

Label: Take Damage From Gibdos Faster
Tooltip: Gibdos will deal damage immediately after grabbing Link.

Label: Take Damage From Dexihands
Tooltip: Link will take damage from Dexihands.

Label: Required Boss Remains
Tooltip: Set the number of Boss Remains required to proceed through the final Giants cutscene.

Label: Logic Mode
Tooltip:
Select mode of logic:
 - Casual: The randomization logic ensures that the game can be beaten casually.
 - Glitched: The randomization logic allows for placement of items that are only obtainable using known glitches.
 - Vanilla Layout: All items are left vanilla.
 - User Logic: Upload your own custom logic to be used in the randomization.
 - No Logic: Completely random, no guarantee the game is beatable. Uses Glitched logic with all tricks enabled for HTML tracker and Blitz junk location calculation.

Label: Item Placement
Tooltip: Select the order that items are placed. If you don't know what this does, just use Random.

Label: Enabled Tricks
DefaultValue: Day 2 Grave Without Lens of Truth

Universal.Label: Blast Mask Long Jumps As Zora/FD

Path to Snowhead.Tooltip: Roll along the sides of the gaps.

Path to Snowhead.Label: Path to Snowhead Jumping and Climbing
Path to Snowhead.Tooltip: Long jump and climb across the gaps in Path to Snowhead.

Path to Snowhead.Label: Path to Snowhead as FD
Path to Snowhead.Tooltip: Jump across the gaps in Path to Snowhead with the Fierce Deity Anywhere gimmick.

Path to Snowhead.Label: Path to Snowhead Pillar Without Lens of Truth
Path to Snowhead.Tooltip: Jump along the invisible platforms without Lens of Truth.

Path to Snowhead.Label: Path to Snowhead Pillar as FD
Path to Snowhead.Tooltip: Jump from the last invisible platform in Path to Snowhead to the pillar as Fierce Deity.

Path to Snowhead.Label: Path to Snowhead Pillar as Giant Link
Path to Snowhead.Tooltip: Jump from the last invisible platform in Path to Snowhead to the pillar as Giant Link.

Path to Snowhead.Label: Path to Snowhead Pillar Long Jump Climb
Path to Snowhead.Tooltip: Long jump from the last invisible platform in Path to Snowhead to the pillar with the Climb Most Surfaces gimmick.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Tall Jumps
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: With Zora Mask, Adult Link, or Fierce Deity, get through the bridge room and the Goron Pound switch room with some platforming.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Lensless Walls/Ceilings
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Pass through false walls, and also collect Stray Fairies in false walls and ceilings, without Lens of Truth.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Pillar Skip
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Shoot or bomb the snowballs, then jump down.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Jump to Stray Fairies
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Jump to the two fairies in the SHT bridge room.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Fireless
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Thaw ice with precise arrow shots through torches, and raise the pillar with Flame Storage.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Lensless Map Room Ledge
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Jump along the small invisible platforms leading to the Stray Fairy chest at the top of the Map room without Lens of Truth.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT as Giant
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Navigate Snowhead Temple with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere. You can go all the way to the top with just Giant's Mask and a Magic Meter!

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Gainers
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Use Gainers in Snowhead Temple to climb ledges that are barely out of reach.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Goron Bomb Jumps
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump to ledges that are just barely out of reach in Snowhead Temple.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Long Jumps
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Cross gaps in Snowhead Temple with Long Jumps.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Twin Block Goron Pound
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Get on top of the two blocks stacked on top of eachother with an extremely precise, nuanced Goron Pound that clips into the corner of the block.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Bridge Room With Bunny Hood
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Get past the bridge room with an extremely precise jump and jump slash as human, only possible with Bunny Hood.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Elevator Skip as FD
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Skip using the elevator that requires Fire Arrows with a jump from the crates as Fierce Deity Link.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Ramps as FD
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Jump across the ledges with ramps on the 2nd floor as Fierce Deity Link.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Pixelshot
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: From the first floor, Hookshot the torch in the main room above where the Scarecrow is.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Frozen Switch Clip
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: In the Compass room, roll into the switch at the right angle to activate it without thawing the ice.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT 3F Jumps
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Jump from the top level of the frozen stairwell to the platform with the 3rd locked door, and also jump from the 3rd locked door to the Goron Pound switch room.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Fireless Pillar Long Jump
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Long jump around the ramps on the 2nd floor in the main room, even if the pillar is raised, with a tall form and precise Long Jump angles.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Icicle Room Rupees as Zora
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Collect the rupees with Zora Boomerangs without breaking the ice.

Snowhead Temple.Label: SHT Fairy Bubbles With Explosives
Snowhead Temple.Tooltip: Collect Stray Fairies in Snowhead Temple by popping the bubbles with explosives or Bombchu.

Romani Ranch.Label: Bowless Aliens
Romani Ranch.Tooltip: Pause and unpause until 5:15. Logic expects Sun's Song.

Romani Ranch.Label: Milk Multiple Cows
Romani Ranch.Tooltip: Play Epona's Song multiple times in a row for a group of cows before any respond. Then they will all give you their item.

Romani Ranch.Label: Dog Race Luck
Romani Ranch.Tooltip: Removes Mask of Truth as a requirement for Dog Race.

Romani Ranch.Label: Doggy Racetrack Chest With Jump Slash
Romani Ranch.Tooltip: Use a jump slash to upwarp on top of the awning in the Doggy Racetrack for the chest.

Romani Ranch.Label: Ranch Tingle With Sword Beams
Romani Ranch.Tooltip: Shoot a Sword Beam at Tingle's balloon as Fierce Deity Link. You can get the right angle by targeting the pickaxe guy between him and the rock, on all 3 days.

Romani Ranch.Label: Doggy Racetrack Chest With Nothing
Romani Ranch.Tooltip: Climb onto the awning with a precise jump without using a sword to Jump Slash through it.

Great Bay Coast.Label: Coast Ledge Long Jump
Great Bay Coast.Tooltip: Long Jump from the top of the Hookshot target to the next ledge, then long jump from there to the Piece of Heart on the next ledge.

Great Bay Coast.Label: Coast Ledge Zora Jump
Great Bay Coast.Tooltip: Jump to the Piece of Heart on the ledge from the higher ledge as Zora or Adult Link.

Great Bay Coast.Label: Coast Ledge as FD
Great Bay Coast.Tooltip: Jump to the highest ledge from the Hookshot target as Fierce Deity, then jump to the ledge for the Piece of Heart.

Great Bay Coast.Label: Coast Ledge as Giant
Great Bay Coast.Tooltip: Climb to the Hookshot target as Giant Link, then either Zora/Adult Gainer onto the Hookshot target and Long Jump from there, or do the rest of the platforming as Fierce Deity.

Great Bay Coast.Label: Great Bay Cows With Nothing
Great Bay Coast.Tooltip: Get hurled up to the cow grotto in Great Bay Coast by a Like Like.

Great Bay Coast.Label: Great Bay Tingle as FD
Great Bay Coast.Tooltip: Hit Tingle down with a Sword Beam as Fierce Deity. You will need to cleverly utilize a Bombchu to target for the right angle.

Oceanside Spider House.Label: Exit OSH Without Goron
Oceanside Spider House.Tooltip: Backwalk up the slope to exit.

Oceanside Spider House.Label: OSH Brute Force Code
Oceanside Spider House.Tooltip: Removes Captain's Hat as requirement for Ocean Spider House mask code.

Oceanside Spider House.Label: OSH Fireless
Oceanside Spider House.Tooltip: At the entrance, simply hit the skulltula from a precise position. In the storage room, get on the boat, slash the skulltula, then jump slash to get the token.

Oceanside Spider House.Label: OSH Storage Room Clip
Oceanside Spider House.Tooltip: In the Ocean Spider House storage room, jump onto the boat and clip through the ceiling.

Oceanside Spider House.Label: Enter Ocean Spider House as Goron
Oceanside Spider House.Tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump over the fence in the first room.

Oceanside Spider House.Label: Enter Ocean Spider House as Giant
Oceanside Spider House.Tooltip: Destroy the cracked wall with a swing of Giant Link's sword, and also get past the fence in the first room with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere.

Oceanside Spider House.Label: OSH as Zora
Oceanside Spider House.Tooltip: Collect the tokens from the Skulltulas inside holes in the Oceanside Spider House as Zora with either boomerangs through walls, or very precise boomerangs into the holes.

Oceanside Spider House.Label: OSH as Giant
Oceanside Spider House.Tooltip: Collect Skulltula Tokens in holes by jumping out of bounds with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere.

Oceanside Spider House.Label: OSH Storage Room Behind Crate Skull as Adult With Hookshot
Oceanside Spider House.Tooltip: Collect the token through the wall with Hookshot.

Oceanside Spider House.Label: OSH Storage Room Behind Crate Skull as Adult With Fish
Oceanside Spider House.Tooltip: Collect the token through the wall with... a fish??

Oceanside Spider House.Label: OSH Entrance Skulls With Nothing
Oceanside Spider House.Tooltip: Kill the skulls somehow, and collect their tokens with precise sidehops.

Oceanside Spider House.Label: OSH Entrance Web Skull as Goron
Oceanside Spider House.Tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump onto the fence, then Goron Pound and platform up the webs to get to the Skulltula.

Zora Cape.Label: Swim to Zora Hall as Human
Zora Cape.Tooltip: You can avoid being damaged by the fish by swimming sideways.

Zora Cape.Label: Zora Cape as Giant
Zora Cape.Tooltip: Climb all the way up to the Waterfall Rapids with tactical jump slashes as Giant Link.

Zora Cape.Label: Zora Jar Game with Explosives
Zora Cape.Tooltip: Blow up all the pots on the same frame. Can be "buffered" with Ocarina, or simply done with a well-timed Blast Mask explosion combined with a bomb.

Zora Cape.Label: Ocean Great Fairy With Ice Arrows
Zora Cape.Tooltip: Create ice platforms with Ice Arrows, and climb up to the Ocean Great Fairy as a tall form, or with a Goron Bomb Jump.

Zora Cape.Label: Ocean Great Fairy as FD
Zora Cape.Tooltip: Perform a Zora High Ledge Grab to the small island nearest the grotto, then jump the rest of the way with Fierce Deity Link.

Zora Cape.Label: Turtle Jump
Zora Cape.Tooltip: Jump and "climb" onto the turtle you ride to Great Bay Temple as Fierce Deity Link.

Zora Cape.Label: Zora Jar Game With Powder Keg
Zora Cape.Tooltip: Simply place a Powder Keg in the middle and watch it blow up all the jars at once, winning the game.

Zora Cape.Label: Zora Cape Recoil Flip
Zora Cape.Tooltip: Recoil flip from above the Deku Flower to the Ledge Without Tree Chest.

Zora Cape.Label: Like Like With Bombchu
Zora Cape.Tooltip: Kill the Like Like under the falls in Zora Cape with Bombchu.

Zora Cape.Label: The Giant Dive
Zora Cape.Tooltip: Kill the Like-Like under the falls in Zora Cape from a distance, then dive for the item using Giant's Mask to grab it as if it was Ruto's Letter.

Zora Hall.Label: Lulu's Ledge as Goron
Zora Hall.Tooltip: Goron Pound underneath the ledge with the Heart Piece in Lulu's Room to upwarp on top of it.

Zora Hall.Label: Lulu's Ledge as Zora
Zora Hall.Tooltip: Climb onto the ledge in Lulu's room by navigating the furniture.

Pirates' Fortress.Label: PF Guard Room Rear Entry
Pirates' Fortress.Tooltip: Jump from the Hookshot room to the back entrance of the Guard room. Or roll over the roof as Goron.

Pirates' Fortress.Label: FD Jump Into PFI
Pirates' Fortress.Tooltip: Jump from the pound switch to the railing outside Pirates' Fortress Interior.

Pirates' Fortress.Label: Hookshot Room Skull Flag Rupees With Zora Boomerangs
Pirates' Fortress.Tooltip: Collect the rupees from the skull flag in the Hookshot room without releasing the bees using Zora Boomerangs through the walls.

Pirates' Fortress.Label: Hookshot Room Long Jump to Tank
Pirates' Fortress.Tooltip: Long jump from the Hookshot chest to the tank with the egg inside.

Pirates' Fortress.Label: Sewers With Bombchu
Pirates' Fortress.Tooltip: Navigate through Pirates' Fortress Sewers using Bombchu to hit the crystal switches where available.

Pirates' Fortress.Label: Sewers With Explosives
Pirates' Fortress.Tooltip: Long Jump to the first crystal switch to raise the metal gate. With Blast Mask, you can also hit the second crystal switch to activate the water elevator while simultaneously performing a Long Jump/Recoil Flip to get to the water elevator in time.

Pinnacle Rock.Label: Pinnacle Rock without Seahorse
Pinnacle Rock.Tooltip: Learn the path and enter Pinnacle Rock without the Seahorse.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Goron Waterwheel
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Skip the first yellow turnkey with a precise Goron roll.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Cutscene Diving
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Freeze and unfreeze the water blocking the green pump room to dive to the deeper parts of the temple without Zora Mask.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT as Giant
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Pass the water control room as Giant Link. You can also take the mask off in the water in the whirlpool room to dive to the bottom without Zora Mask.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Whirlpool Access as FD
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Skip using the yellow valve in the water control room to activate the yellow pipe's water stream platform, by just jumping across as Fierce Deity Link.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Red Pump Long Jump
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Long Jump from the pipe to the red water pump turn key (outside Wart room) with explosives.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Red Pump as FD
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Jump to the red water pump turn key (outside Wart room) from below as Fierce Deity Link.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Red Valve Early
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Get to the closed red valve room early by bonking off a nearby wall while dolphin diving out of the water as Zora, and use a Gainer to climb up to the ledge with the turnkey without freezing the Chu Chu.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Map Chest Room Jumps
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Jump around the platforms in the room with the Map Chest in Great Bay Temple as Zora/Adult Link/Fierce Deity, or with Long Jumps. In particular, FD can jump to the seesaw room from here.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Red Control Turnkey as FD
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Jump to the platform with the red turnkey in the water control room as Fierce Deity Link from the rising platform on the left.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Red Control Turnkey With Bombs
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Skip needing Hookshot to use the red turnkey in the water control room by recoil flipping to the platform. Alternatively, use a Goron Bomb Jump or a Deku shield recoil.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Exit as FD
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Jump to the turtle's nose as Fierce Deity with a precise jump from the torches, then strafe around the nose and up onto the turtle's back.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Exit as Goron
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump onto the turtle's nose from the torches Stray Fairy chest, then Goron Bomb Jump onto the turtle's back.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Exit With Nothing
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Exit Great Bay Temple with only sticks, if necessary. Jump slash onto the turtle's nose, then you can jump slash around the turtle's eye and onto its back. This trick is very, very unlikely to be required; mostly used to remove exit requirements from Great Bay Temple in Dungeon Entrance Randomizer.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Green Pump Room Early as FD
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Jump around the waterstream blocking the ladder to the green pump room as Fierce Deity Link.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Iceless
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Navigate through the waterwheel room without Ice Arrows.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Fireless
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Navigate through the seesaw room without Fire Arrows.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Boss Door as FD
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Skip setting up the green pipe water stream platform with a simple jump across the gap to the Great Bay boss door as Fierce Deity Link.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Iron Goron Sneaks Past Dexihands
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Get past the Dexihands between the map chest room and the Bio Baba tunnel by quickly swimming through as human. Also, open the Great Bay Small Key chest by juking out the dexihand there.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Boss Key With Ice Arrows
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Create an Ice Arrow platform and climb up the window to skip the Gekko fight.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Boss Key With Explosives
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Long jump to the Great Bay Boss Key chest with explosives. A tall figure is needed to grab onto the window.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Boss Key as FD
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Jump to the exit window for the Great Bay Boss Key chest as Fierce Deity Link.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Boss Key as Zora/Adult
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Jump to the exit window for the Great Bay Boss Key chest with a highly precise diagonal roll jump against the wall as Zora or Adult Link.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Boss Key as Giant
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: As Giant Link, jump slash to the right of the ice blocking the door from near the Small Key chest to get to the Boss Key chest with a bizarre clip.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Underwater Hookshot
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Hookshot into most of the rooms of Great Bay Temple with the gimmick Hookshot Any Surface.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Boss Key Climb
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Climb into the exit window for the Great Bay Boss Key chest with the gimmick Climb Most Surfaces; requires climbing above the window and jump slashing inside.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Skulltula With Stick
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Kill the Skulltula holding a Stray Fairy in Great Bay Temple with a Deku Stick.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Stray Fairy Collection With Bombchu
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Release Stray Fairies in Great Bay Temple from jars, barrels, and bubbles using Bombchu.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Water Control Room Underwater Fairy With Nothing
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Get this fairy with two precise dives from the platform with the Skulltula and the rupee triangle.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Pre-Boss Bubble Fairy as Zora
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Jump out of the water at the Stray Fairy underneath the green turnkey in the room before Gyorg as Zora.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Pre-Boss Bubble Fairy Recoil Flip
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Recoil flip into the stray fairy bubble underneath the green turnkey in the room before Gyorg.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Waterwheel Room as FD
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Jump to the Stray Fairy chests in the Waterwheel Room as Fierce Deity Link.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Waterwheel Fairy Chests With Explosives
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Long jump to the upper Stray Fairy chest from the rising platform, and recoil flip to the lower Stray Fairy chest from the horizontally moving platform.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Waterwheel Room Lower Chest With Nothing
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Get into the lower cove with the Stray Fairy chest in the waterwheel room with a very precise sidehop and a jump slash.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Green Pump Room Climb
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Shimmy up the green pipe to get above the ceiling in the green pump room with the gimmick Climb Most Surfaces.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Whirlpool Jar as FD
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Break the jar with the Stray Fairy at the bottom of the giant whirlpool with a precise Sword Beam angled by targeting a Bombchu.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Bio Babas With Bombchu
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Kill all 4 Bio Babas for the Stray Fairy chest with Bombchu.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Dexihands Jar With Explosives
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Blow up the jar holding this Stray Fairy captive, then collect the Fairy with a surviving Dexihand.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Green Pump Room Giant Upwarp
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: After entering the green pump room, put on Giant's Mask from a precise position to instantly warp to the ceiling section of the room.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Gyorg Quick Kill
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Skip the cutscene for Gyorg spawning piranhas by finishing it off with Fierce Deity while it is above the platform.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Gyorg Without Magic
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Kill Gyorg using only Zora Link, and no magic.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Gyorg With Arrows
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Kill Gyorg with only arrows by sidehopping into the water and shooting arrows at it as you fall in.

Great Bay Temple.Label: GBT Gyorg as Goron
Great Bay Temple.Tooltip: Kill Gyorg with the Iron Goron gimmick.

Road to Ikana.Label: Road to Ikana Fences With Goron Bomb Jumps
Road to Ikana.Tooltip: Self-explanatory. Drop a bomb, pound as Goron, uncurl midair.

Road to Ikana.Label: Road to Ikana Fences With Goron Bubble Boosts
Road to Ikana.Tooltip: Damage boost off the bubbles at night in Road to Ikana with Goron Pounds.

Road to Ikana.Label: Ikana Canyon Access as FD
Road to Ikana.Tooltip: Damage boost onto the boulder below the ghost, then climb up with a gainer as Fierce Deity.

Road to Ikana.Label: Road to Ikana Pot as FD
Road to Ikana.Tooltip: Hit the pot with a Sword Beam by summoning the scarecrow and targeting it for a good beam angle.

Road to Ikana.Label: Road to Ikana Pot With Bombchu
Road to Ikana.Tooltip: Break the pot with the Fairy inside with a Bombchu.

Ikana Graveyard.Label: Day 2 Grave Without Lens of Truth
Ikana Graveyard.Tooltip: Pass the false wall into Day 2 Grave, and cross the section with the invisible floor without Lens of Truth.

Ikana Graveyard.Label: Stun Keeta with Bombs
Ikana Graveyard.Tooltip: Use a bomb to stun Captain Keeta before he moves away.

Ikana Graveyard.Label: Defeat Dampe Big Poe With Nothing
Ikana Graveyard.Tooltip: You can lure the Big Poe to the stairs for a clean shot at jump slashing it with your best sword, or Deku Sticks.

Ikana Graveyard.Label: Defeat Keeta With Sticks
Ikana Graveyard.Tooltip: Beat Keeta with only a single broken Deku Stick. You can either fight through the Stalchildren, which is tight on time, or simply mash backflip up the slope near the Captain's Hat chest and intercept Keeta.

Ikana Graveyard.Label: Keeta as Goron
Ikana Graveyard.Tooltip: Defeat Keeta without stunning him as Goron Link by getting through the Stalchildren quickly.

Ikana Graveyard.Label: Ikana Graveyard Rocks Without Sonata
Ikana Graveyard.Tooltip: Get on the other side of Keeta without waking him up by performing a very precise Goron Pound onto a lantern above the door to Dampe's hut, backflip a little higher, then do a twisted backflip as human to climb up.

Ikana Graveyard.Label: Ikana Graveyard Bats With Sticks and Bombs
Ikana Graveyard.Tooltip: Kill the bats in Day 1 grave with only sticks, and kill all the bats around the graveyard on day 2 with sticks and bombs.

Ikana Canyon.Label: Ikana Canyon Iceless
Ikana Canyon.Tooltip: Hookshot to the first stump from a precise position.

Ikana Canyon.Label: Poe Hut With Bombs and Sticks
Ikana Canyon.Tooltip: Defeat the first three Poes with Deku Sticks, then simply blow up the last Poe with bombs or Blast Mask.

Ikana Canyon.Label: Canyon Ledge as FD
Ikana Canyon.Tooltip: Jump to the Piece of Heart as Fierce Deity, with moderate precision required.

Ikana Canyon.Label: Canyon Tingle as FD
Ikana Canyon.Tooltip: Hit Tingle down with a Sword Beam as Fierce Deity. You will need to cleverly utilize a Bombchu or a Guay to target for the right angle.

Beneath the Well.Label: Defeat Well Big Poe With Bombs
Beneath the Well.Tooltip: Kill the Big Poe in the Well by simply throwing bombs at it.

Beneath the Well.Label: Pacifist Well Hot Spring Water
Beneath the Well.Tooltip: Collect Hot Spring Water in the Well without killing the Dexihand by quickly scooping the water from behind it, and soaring away.

Beneath the Well.Label: Wallmaster Void Out
Beneath the Well.Tooltip: Bring Hot Spring Water from the Dexihand to the Well Cow by allowing a Wallmaster to grab you and take you back to the Ikana Castle side of the well.

Ikana Castle.Label: Ikana Castle Invisible Platform Without Lens of Truth
Ikana Castle.Tooltip: Navigate the single invisible ice platform in Ikana Castle without Lens of Truth.

Ikana Castle.Label: Igos Fight Swordless
Ikana Castle.Tooltip: Defeat Igos du Ikana with Deku Sticks or something like Ice Arrows.

Ikana Castle.Label: Ikana Castle Gainer
Ikana Castle.Tooltip: Perform a Gainer over the sun block blocking Ikana Castle.

Ikana Castle.Label: Ikana Castle Access as Goron
Ikana Castle.Tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump over the sun block blocking Ikana Castle.

Ikana Castle.Label: Ikana Castle as FD
Ikana Castle.Tooltip: Get through the left side of Ikana Castle as Fierce Deity Link, and also jump to the Castle Pillar Heart Piece without Deku Mask.

Ikana Castle.Label: Ikana Castle Falling Ceiling Room as Zora/Adult Link
Ikana Castle.Tooltip: Get on top of the falling ceiling as Zora or Adult Link with either a Gainer or a sidehop jump slash, then climb to the switch that unlocks the barred doors.

Ikana Castle.Label: Ikana Castle Falling Ceiling Room as Human
Ikana Castle.Tooltip: Get on top of the falling ceiling with either a Gainer or a sidehop jump slash, raise the ceiling by shooting one of the crystal switches with bow, then ride the ceiling up to the switch that unlocks the barred doors.

Ikana Castle.Label: Ikana Castle Pillar as Goron
Ikana Castle.Tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump onto the railing of the side of the castle, then navigate along the railing and sidehop to the Piece of Heart.

Ikana Castle.Label: Ikana Castle Hole Room Jumps
Ikana Castle.Tooltip: Jump to the pots in the hole room of Ikana Castle as human, and jump around the Skulltulas while doing the room in reverse.

Stone Tower.Label: Climb Stone Tower with One Transformation
Stone Tower.Tooltip: Play Elegy while on a block to ride the block up.

Stone Tower.Label: Climb Stone Tower as FD
Stone Tower.Tooltip: Skip half of the Elegy of Emptiness switches with Fierce Deity Link's jumps.

Stone Tower.Label: Climb Stone Tower as Giant
Stone Tower.Tooltip: Climb the entirety of Stone Tower with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere. Requires a sword for jump slashing.

Stone Tower.Label: Flip Stone Tower Without Elegy
Stone Tower.Tooltip: Shoot a Light Arrow with a precise shot, combined with a precise roll to manipulate one of the Elegy of Emptiness blocks out of the way of the shot.

Stone Tower.Label: Stone Tower Bean Chests as Giant
Stone Tower.Tooltip: Jump slash to the bean chests as Giant Link.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Elegy Maze With Bombchu
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Break the cracked wall with a Real Bombchu detonation.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Water Tunnel as Human
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Swim through the underwater tunnel with a precise roll jump dive inside. Hold A for the deepest possible dive.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Elegy Maze Climb
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Climb over the exit game in the maze with the gimmick Climb Most Surfaces enabled.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT as Giant
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Navigate through uninverted Stone Tower Temple with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere enabled.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Eyegore Bridge as Zora
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Dolphin dive onto the Eyegore bridge as Zora Link with a precise bonk.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Eyegore Bridge With Explosives
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Get on top of the railing or sunblock in the Eyegore room, then Recoil Flip or Long Jump onto the bridge. Alternatively, Goron Bomb Jump onto the bridge from an Ice Arrow ice platform.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Gainers
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Gainer onto the sun block in Stone Tower Temple with sufficiently tall transformations.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Eyegore Bridge as FD
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Jump onto the Eyegore Bridge as Fierce Deity Link.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Updraft Room With Explosives
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Recoil flip through the updraft room with explosives.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Updraft Room as FD
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Jump through the updraft room as Fierce Deity Link.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Updraft Room With Powder Keg
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Goron roll through the first updraft to get to the other side, then use a Powder Keg to Recoil Flip through the other 2 sets of updrafts.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Updraft Room as Goron/Zora
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Goron roll through the first updraft to get to the other side, then use a Zora Jump Slash recoil to fly through the other 2 sets of updrafts.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Lava Room Ledge as Zora
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Perform an incredibly precise Zora Jump Slash in the first updraft to barely make it onto this ledge.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Lava Room Ledge as Goron
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Goron roll through the first updraft to get to the other side, then hookshot the chest.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Eyegore Bridge to Courtyard
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Jump slash onto the railing of the bridge, and then cross the water with either Deku Mask, Ice Arrows, or a Recoil Flip.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Garo Master With Sticks
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Defeat the Garo Master in Stone Tower Temple with Deku Sticks.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Map Chest Recoil Flip
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: From the basement ledge, use a precise curved Recoil Flip to land on top of the sun block.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Basement Ledge Jump Slash Recoil
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Get onto the basement ledge by falling down the hole in the ceiling, and using a Jump Slash wall recoil to land on the ledge.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Basement Ceiling With Real Bombchu

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Map Chest as FD

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Armos With Nuts

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Armos With Bombchu

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Thin Bridge Crystal as Zora
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Hit the switch through the floor with Zora Boomerangs.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Thin Bridge Crystal as FD

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Thin Bridge Crystal With Nothing
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Jump slash the crystal through the wall with as little as a Deku Stick.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Underwater Sun Switch Snipe

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Underwater Sun Switch With Ice Arrows
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Shoot the underwater sun switch from the uninverted side on top of an ice platform over the water.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Goron Bomb Jumps
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump on top of the sun blocks in the Eyegore room.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Bridge Crystal With Explosives
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Activate the crystal switch in the Eyegore room with explosives through the railing.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Bridge Crystal as Zora
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Activate the crystal switch in the Eyegore room with Zora Boomerangs through the railing.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Bridge Crystal With Nothing
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Activate the crystal switch in the Eyegore room with as little as a single Deku Stick through the railing, with a precise Jump Slash.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Bridge Crystal With Spin Attack
Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Activate the crystal switch in the Eyegore room with a big Spin Attack.

Stone Tower Temple.Label: STT Bridge Crystal With Ice Arrows

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: Shoot Twinmold

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Hookshot to Eyegore
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Shoot the Eyegore with Light Arrows from below, then hookshot to the chest.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Early Boss Key
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Drop down from the Dexihand either as Deku or with a sidehop and Jump Slash.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Lightless Boss Key
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Kill Gomess without Light Arrows by waiting for an opening when Gomess uses a special attack.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Updraft Recoil Flips
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Recoil flip inside the tallest updraft to get to the Updraft Fire Ring chest, and to the upstairs puzzle rooms.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Lobby Long Jump
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Long Jump to the Death Armos switch with explosives.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Lobby as FD
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Jump to the Death Armos switch as Fierce Deity Link.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT as Giant
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Navigate through the rooms of Inverted Stone Tower Temple as Giant Link with the gimmick Giant's Mask Anywhere.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Updrafts Without Deku Mask
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Ride the updrafts up without Deku Mask.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Lava Room Gainer
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Gainer through the upsidedown lava room upstairs with a sufficiently tall transformation.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Lava Room With Explosives
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Recoil flip through the upsidedown lava room upstairs, or Goron Bomb Jump over the short wall.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Eyegore Bridge Recoil Flips
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Recoil Flip from the bridge to either side, including towards the Dexihand, to get launched into the updraft room.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Wizzrobe Goron Bomb Jump
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Goron Bomb Jump to the Wizzrobe chest from below.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Hanging Explosive Dodging
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Cross under the Eyegore bridge with the Deku Flowers by flying underneath the explosives, and flying into them from behind to destroy them.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Poe Gap as FD
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Jump the gap with the Poes as Fierce Deity Link.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Eyegore Bridge to Dexihand as FD
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Self-explanatory jump. You may have to try several times before actually getting a proper jump off the bridge.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Recoil Flip to Eyegore Bridge
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Recoil flip onto the Eyegore bridge from the passage leading out from the updraft room.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Death Armos Maze Chest Recoil Flip
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Skip needing Elegy or Hookshot for the fire ring in the maze by simply outrunning the returning fire with a recoil flip.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Thin Bridge Rupees as Goron
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Collect the rupees from above by rolling over them as Goron Link.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Frozen Eye Chest Ledge With Nothing
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Jump to the ledge where the Stray Fairy chest spawns from above with no items.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Thin Bridge Three Blue Rupees as Zora
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Collect the rupees through the wall with Zora Boomerangs.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Updraft Rupee Gainer
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Get up to the ledge with the two red rupees in the updraft room with a Gainer and a tall transformation.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Updraft Rupee Goron Bomb Jump
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Get up to the ledge with the two red rupees in the updraft room with a Goron Bomb Jump.

Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Label: ISTT Updraft Rupees as Zora
Inverted Stone Tower Temple.Tooltip: Grab the rupees through the sun block with Zora Boomerangs.

The Moon.Label: Deku Trial as FD
The Moon.Tooltip: Collect the Piece of Heart in Deku Trial without Deku Mask using some fine platforming as Fierce Deity Link. You cannot actually complete the trial in this way.

The Moon.Label: Deku Trial With Hookshot Most Surfaces
The Moon.Tooltip: Hookshot your way across the trial. To get to the door, hookshot from the moving platform.

The Moon.Label: Goron Trial as FD
The Moon.Tooltip: Get through Goron Trial as Fierce Deity with sideways long jumps across long gaps.

The Moon.Label: Zora Trial as Human
The Moon.Tooltip: Swim through the pipes as human. You need either Song of Time, Goron Mask, or a death warp to escape the Heart Piece spot.

The Moon.Label: Link Trial With Sticks
The Moon.Tooltip: Kill the Dinolfos and defeat the Garo Master on the Moon with Deku Sticks.

The Moon.Label: Link Trial With Songs
The Moon.Tooltip: Skip the challenges to unlock barred doors (and summon a ladder) on the Moon by playing songs at specific Gossip Stones.

The Moon.Label: Link Trial as FD
The Moon.Tooltip: Climb up past the Iron Knuckle as Fierce Deity Link without spawning the ladder. Either jump from the Iron Knuckle chest, or perform a FD Gainer.

Racing Banned Tricks.Label: Termina Stump with No Items
Racing Banned Tricks.Tooltip: Slowly walk up the seam of the stump.

Racing Banned Tricks.Label: Ranch Tingle as FD
Racing Banned Tricks.Tooltip: Climb the "Out of Bounds" ledge near the sign to Romani Ranch, and take Tingle down with a jump and a Jump Slash.

Racing Banned Tricks.Label: Powder Keg Challenge Access as Zora/Adult Link
Racing Banned Tricks.Tooltip: Shield the ice, then quickly climb up and drop hot spring water before the ice hits you again.

Racing Banned Tricks.Label: Climb Into Romani Ranch
Racing Banned Tricks.Tooltip: Climb through the boulder in Milk Road with the Climb Most Surfaces gimmick.

Racing Banned Tricks.Label: FD Jump into Ranch
Racing Banned Tricks.Tooltip: Jump over the boulder in Milk Road as Fierce Deity. You can climb on some of the terrain near Tingle.

Racing Banned Tricks.Label: Hookshot into Ranch
Racing Banned Tricks.Tooltip: Hookshot into Ranch with the gimmick Hookshot Any Surface.

Racing Banned Tricks.Label: Reverse Well With Climbing
Racing Banned Tricks.Tooltip: Enter the Well from Ikana Castle with Deku Mask and the Climb Most Surfaces gimmick.

Racing Banned Tricks.Label: Garo Mask Skip
Racing Banned Tricks.Tooltip: Bug limit Ikana access with a Goron damage boost, a lot of slope climbing, and a recoil flip.

Racing Banned Tricks.Label: Pirates' Fortress Upper Chest as Goron
Racing Banned Tricks.Tooltip: Roll along the slope on the side as Goron to get to the upper chest in Pirates' Fortress Interior.

Racing Banned Tricks.Label: Pirates' Fortress Upper Chest as FD
Racing Banned Tricks.Tooltip: Jump along the slope to the side as Fierce Deity to get to the upper chest in Pirates' Fortress Interior.

Racing Banned Tricks.Label: Goron Racetrack Access as FD
Racing Banned Tricks.Tooltip: Long jump onto some grabbable terrain as Fierce Deity, then navigate the terrain to sidehop into the racetrack loading zone from above.

Racing Banned Tricks.Label: Goron Racetrack Access With Hookshot/Climb Anywhere
Racing Banned Tricks.Tooltip: Get above the giant boulder in front of the Goron Racetrack, and sidehop into the loading zone.

Racing Banned Tricks.Label: Swamp Tingle With Climbing
Racing Banned Tricks.Tooltip: Climb up the wall near Tingle with the Climb Most Surfaces gimmick to get in range for a jump slash take down.

PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Label: Super Bowless Aliens
PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Tooltip: Mash pause for ~30 minutes (That's real time, not in-game time!) to complete Aliens Defense without a bow or Sun's Song.

PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Label: Low% Ocean Great Fairy
PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Tooltip: Get to the Fairy Fountain in Zora Cape with just Zora Mask and an explosive. Extremely precise and requires a highly specific setup; not for the faint of heart!

PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Label: Path to Snowhead with Nothing
PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Tooltip: Mash jump slashes on the slopes on the left sides of the gaps.

PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Label: Road to Ikana Fences as Zora
PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Tooltip: Get over the fences in Road to Ikana with highly precise Zora ground jump, jump slash, damage boosts with bombs.

PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Label: Ikana Canyon Access as FD With Real Bombchu
PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Tooltip: Damage boost off a Real Bombchu during the day in Road to Ikana to get on the boulder under the ghost for the trick Ikana Canyon Access as FD.

PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Label: WFT Twisted Recoil Flip
PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Tooltip: Get through the first room in Woodfall Temple with a highly technical sideways recoil flip as Zora or Adult Link; probably one of the most challenging jumps in all of Casual Logic!

PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Label: Stump Chest With Bats
PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Tooltip: Damage boost off a nearby Bad Bat as Goron to get on top of the stump.

PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Label: Twinmold Minimalism
PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Tooltip: Kill Twinmold with just about any valid damaging hitbox, including just a Kokiri Sword.

PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Label: Rock Sirloin Fireless
PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Tooltip: Get the Rock Sirloin without lighting the chandelier or the torches. Break the chandelier pot closest to the Baby Goron side with Goron Spikes to get the chandelier swaying slightly, then quickly break the chandelier pot with the Rock Sirloin inside with an extremely precise Goron Spike Roll.

PROCEED WITH CAUTION.Label: Lens Cave With Powder Keg Challenge

Setting.Label: Faster Bank
Setting.Tooltip: Makes Bank 2 require nothing, and Bank 3 require any wallet.

Easy.Label: Scarecrow's Song
Easy.Tooltip: Using Scarecrow's Song where not normally required.

Easy.Label: Lensless Chests
Easy.Tooltip: Open invisible chests without the Lens of Truth.

Easy.Label: Long Jump
Easy.Tooltip: Drop a bomb behind you then use the recoil to jump a long distance.

Easy.Label: Run Through Poisoned Water
Easy.Tooltip: Enter poisoned swamp by walking as Zora, or FD if it is enabled.

Easy.Label: Swim to Zora Hall as Human
Easy.Tooltip: You can avoid being damaged by the fish by swimming sideways.

Easy.Label: Brute Force OSH Code
Easy.Tooltip: Removes Captain's Hat as requirement for Ocean Spider House mask code.

Easy.Label: Climb Stone Tower with One Transformation

Easy.Label: Deku Playground Rupee Displacement

Easy.Label: Bomb Hovering
Easy.Tooltip: The quintessential technique of any glitched randomizer of Majora's Mask.

Easy.Label: Enemy Interactions
Easy.Tooltip: Utilize enemies to your advantage. Not compatible with randomized enemies!

Easy.Label: Index Warp
Easy.Tooltip: Activate the Hidden Owl, and you can soar to other owl statues without hitting them.

Easy.Label: Goron Roll Item Grabs
Easy.Tooltip: Abuse the Goron Rolling hitbox to pick up freestanding rupees.

Easy.Label: Melt Sun Blocks With Water

Easy.Label: Powder Keg Storage
Easy.Tooltip: Throw the Powder Keg from Keg Trial to the Hungry Goron, and then you may soar away with it.

Easy.Label: Deku Recoil
Easy.Tooltip: Slide off a ledge at high speed by shielding an explosion as Deku.

Easy.Label: Hookshot Clip
Easy.Tooltip: Clip out of bounds by using the Hookshot on a torch near a wall.

Easy.Label: Icicle Clip
Easy.Tooltip: Clip through walls by backwalking into an icicle.

Easy.Label: Ocarina Dive
Easy.Tooltip: Pull out Ocarina while swinging your sword over a ledge.

Easy.Label: Item Dive
Easy.Tooltip: While hovering over water, use the Ocarina or a cutscene item.

Easy.Label: SHT BK Skip
Easy.Tooltip: Clip through the door using the icicle.

Moderate.Label: Lensless Jumping
Moderate.Tooltip: Jump along invisible platforms without Lens of Truth.

Moderate.Label: WFT 2nd Floor Skip
Moderate.Tooltip: Hookshot to the torch in the main room.

Moderate.Label: Kill Deku Shrine Big Octo

Moderate.Label: Deku Palace Bean Skip

Moderate.Label: Goron Bomb Jump

Moderate.Label: GBT Fireless
Moderate.Tooltip: Navigate through the seesaw room without Fire Arrows.

Moderate.Label: Ikana Canyon Iceless
Moderate.Tooltip: Hookshot to the first stump from a precise position.

Moderate.Label: SHT Zora Jumps
Moderate.Tooltip: Jump from the bridge to the right side of the ice block. And jump to the 3rd locked door.

Moderate.Label: Pinnacle Rock without Seahorse

Moderate.Label: Avoid Swamp Tree Bat

Moderate.Label: Lensless Walls/Ceilings
Moderate.Tooltip: Walk and shoot through false walls without Lens of Truth.

Moderate.Label: Termina Stump with No Items
Moderate.Tooltip: Slowly walk up the seam of the stump.

Moderate.Label: ISTT Hookshot to Eyegore
Moderate.Tooltip: Shoot the Eyegore with Light Arrows from below, then hookshot to the chest.

Moderate.Label: SHT Jump to Stray Fairies

Moderate.Label: Clever Ice Platforms
Moderate.Tooltip: Use ice platforms to your advantage in less obvious places, including shooting the underwater sun switch in STT or for the GBT Boss Key.

Moderate.Label: Inn Balcony Jump
Moderate.Tooltip: Jump to the Inn balcony as Zora or Adult Link.

Moderate.Label: Shoot Goht
Moderate.Tooltip: Shoot Goht with Arrows.

Moderate.Label: STT Water Tunnel as Human
Moderate.Tooltip: Swim through the underwater tunnel with a precise roll jump dive inside. Hold A for the deepest possible dive.

Moderate.Label: FD Jumps
Moderate.Tooltip: Leap across gaps only possible with the Allow Fierce Deity's Mask Anywhere gimmick enabled.

Moderate.Label: STT Eyegore Bridge Jumps
Moderate.Tooltip: Get on top of the railing from inside the bridge with a side hop and a jump slash. Also, dolphin dive onto the bridge as Zora by swimming into either bridge supports with a precise angle.

Moderate.Label: Inn Balcony with Cucco
Moderate.Tooltip: Use a Cucco from the Bombers' Hide and Seek to jump to the Stock Pot Inn balcony.

Moderate.Label: Zora Boomerang Through Walls
Moderate.Tooltip: Use Zora Boomerangs through walls by hugging the wall at an angle.

Moderate.Label: Action Swap
Moderate.Tooltip: While holding an item and crouching, pull out another item and quickly interact with an actor.

Moderate.Label: Long Bomb Hovers
Moderate.Tooltip: Perform bomb hovers with many explosions.

Moderate.Label: Time Stop
Moderate.Tooltip: Delay triggered events by using a bottle in Link's hand immediately after shielding while targeting.

Moderate.Label: Blast Mask Hovers
Moderate.Tooltip: Get ISG in certain locations to perform Blast Mask-Only hovers.

Moderate.Label: Recoil Flip Through Ice
Moderate.Tooltip: Recoil flip through ice in Termina Field, Twin Islands, and Snowhead Temple using only a shield or Zora Mask.

Moderate.Label: Deliver Deku Princess Without Deku Mask
Moderate.Tooltip: Hover over the Deku King's chamber, and drop the Deku Princess from above.

Moderate.Label: Day 1 Grave Clip
Moderate.Tooltip: Sidehop into Composer Flat's grave at an angle.

Moderate.Label: Restricted Items
Moderate.Tooltip: Use normally unavailable items indoors by equipping and using an item on the frame of a ledge popup.

Moderate.Label: STT BK Skip
Moderate.Tooltip: Recoil flip through the door. Alternatively, hover to the loading zone to Twinmold.

Hard.Label: Jump Slash Take Downs
Hard.Tooltip: Hit things with mid-air jump slashes.

Hard.Label: Postman without Bunny Hood
Hard.Tooltip: Get exactly 10 seconds without using the Bunny Hood.

Hard.Label: Keeta with Minimal Items
Hard.Tooltip: Defeat Keeta without stunning him at all. A broken deku and some speed will be sufficient.

Hard.Label: STT Updrafts without Deku Mask
Hard.Tooltip: Ride the ISTT updrafts up one level, and cross the STT updrafts without Deku Mask.

Hard.Label: Path to Snowhead without Magic
Hard.Tooltip: Roll along the sides of the gaps.

Hard.Label: Shoot Twinmold
Hard.Tooltip: Shoot Twinmold's tail with arrows instead of fighting with Giant's Mask.

Hard.Label: SHT Pillar Skip
Hard.Tooltip: Shoot or bomb the snowballs, then jump down.

Hard.Label: GBT Iceless Boss Key
Hard.Tooltip: Jump to the Boss Key chest without an ice platform.

Hard.Label: ISTT Early Boss Key
Hard.Tooltip: Drop down from the Dexihand either as Deku or with a sidehop and jump slash.

Hard.Label: Lensless Climbing
Hard.Tooltip: Climb the Mountain Village invisible ladder without Lens of Truth.

Hard.Label: Gainer
Hard.Tooltip: Backflip away from a wall, then re-target the wall 1 frame later.

Hard.Label: GBT Iceless
Hard.Tooltip: Reverse the water flow without Ice Arrows by using a Long Jump and a Gainer. Pass through the waterwheel room with a precise jump out of the water.

Hard.Label: Zora Jar Game with Explosives

Hard.Label: Keaton Grass Small Spin
Hard.Tooltip: Hit all 9 keaton bushes with a small sword and small spin attack.

Hard.Label: GBT Goron Waterwheel
Hard.Tooltip: Skip the first yellow turnkey with a precise Goron roll.

Hard.Label: Powder Kegs as Explosives
Hard.Tooltip: Use Powder Kegs in place of other explosives.

Hard.Label: Recoil Flip
Hard.Tooltip: Cross gaps by shielding an explosion during a backflip.

Hard.Label: ISTT Lightless Boss Key
Hard.Tooltip: Kill Gomess without Light Arrows by waiting for an opening when Gomess uses a special attack.

Hard.Label: FD Difficult Jumps
Hard.Tooltip: Perform the most difficult jumps, only possible with the Allow Fierce Deity's Mask Anywhere gimmick enabled.

Hard.Label: Snowball Skip
Hard.Tooltip: Backflip past the large snowballs blocking the way in Path to Mountain Village.

Hard.Label: SHT Fireless
Hard.Tooltip: Thaw ice with precise arrow shots through torches, raise the pillar with Flame Storage, and activate the switch in the Compass room by rolling into the ice.

Hard.Label: Big Octo Skip
Hard.Tooltip: Get past the left side Big Octo with a precise jump and Deku voiding invulnerability frames, or get past the right side Big Octo with a Goron roll from above.

Hard.Label: Powder Keg Challenge with Hot Spring Water
Hard.Tooltip: Link can use Hot Spring Water to melt the ice in front of Medigoron's cave with ISG. Zora and Fierce Deity can also do it without ISG.

Hard.Label: GBT Cutscene Diving
Hard.Tooltip: Freeze and unfreeze the water blocking the green pump room to dive to the deeper parts of the temple without Zora Mask.

Hard.Label: Harder Long Jumps
Hard.Tooltip: Includes long jumping sideways to grab awkward ledges, and long jumping as Zora or Fierce Deity with Blast Mask.

Hard.Label: Difficult Goron Spike Rolls
Hard.Tooltip: Use precise movement with Goron Spikes to get to hard-to-reach areas.

Hard.Label: GBT Hookless Exit
Hard.Tooltip: Leave Great Bay Temple without Hookshot by carefully negotiating with the turtle's geometry.

Hard.Label: WFT Bow Skip
Hard.Tooltip: Open the barred doors leading to the pre-boss room of Woodfall Temple with a lit Deku Stick.

Hard.Label: Remote Hookshot
Hard.Tooltip: "Store" a hookshot target by drinking milk after pulling hookshot holding an empty bottle.

Hard.Label: Harder Enemy Interactions
Hard.Tooltip: Utilize enemies to perform difficult tricks. Not compatible with randomized enemies!

Hard.Label: Superslide
Hard.Tooltip: Preserve recoil momentum after taking damage during roll invulnerability frames.

Hard.Label: Weirdshot
Hard.Tooltip: Use Hookshot during the distortion caused by rolling into an explosion.

Hard.Label: WFT Gekko Quick Kill
Hard.Tooltip: Kill the WFT Gekko with bombs and jump slashing.

Hard.Label: WFT Megapound
Hard.Tooltip: During Deku void invulnerability frames, get hit by an explosion while Goron Pounding to get to the 2nd floor of Woodfall Temple.

Hard.Label: Precise Zora Jumps
Hard.Tooltip: Precise Zora Jumps outside of Snowhead Temple.

Hard.Label: WFT BK Skip
Hard.Tooltip: Skip the boss key for Woodfall Temple.

Hard.Label: Zora Clips
Hard.Tooltip: Clip into ledges and walls as Zora.

Hard.Label: Open Upside-Down Chests
Hard.Tooltip: Open chests in ISTT from STT, and vice-versa, with hovering.

Hard.Label: STT Sun Block Clip
Hard.Tooltip: Clip past the sun block in front of the Compass Chest in STT and ISTT.

Hard.Label: Equip Swap
Hard.Tooltip: Equip items over the trade item slot, or the 6th bottle slot.

Hard.Label: STT Underwater Sun Switch Snipe
Hard.Tooltip: Hit the underwater sun switch in STT with a Light Arrow shot off a sidehop.

Hard.Label: Extremely Long Bomb Hovers
Hard.Tooltip: Bomb hovers with many, many explosives, usually only possible with Blast Mask (Instant Blast Mask Cooldown recommended!)

Hard.Label: Path to Snowhead With Nothing
Hard.Tooltip: Get through Path to Snowhead by mashing jump slashes on the edges of the gaps.

Hard.Label: Mountain Village Early Seamwalk
Hard.Tooltip: Carefully walk up the slope and around the ice blocking Path to Mountain Village.

Hard.Label: Epona Push
Hard.Tooltip: Get pushed by Epona's idle animation and amplifying the collision interaction with pause buffering.

Hard.Label: Beneath the Well Sun Block Clip
Hard.Tooltip: Clip through the sun block at the end of Beneath the Well with bombs and Zora Mask or FD Anywhere.

Hard.Label: Zora Hall Doors as Human
Hard.Tooltip: Get past the Zoras in front of Lulu's room and Evan's room with a twisted backflip.

Hard.Label: Honey and Darling Three Days without Bow
Hard.Tooltip: Prevent yourself by getting kicked out of the minigame by pause buffering, and complete the day 2 minigame during the transition to Day 3.

Hard.Label: Flip Stone Tower Without Elegy
Hard.Tooltip: Shoot a Light Arrow at the red emblem and roll over the correct switch nearly simultaneously.

Hard.Label: Ikana Castle Seamwalk
Hard.Tooltip: Seamwalk to the top of the castle from the castle's corner on the right side.

Hard.Label: Enter Pirates' Fortress Sewers as Deku
Hard.Tooltip: Clip into the Sewers from behind by voiding into a water stream as Deku.

Hard.Label: Ignore Fire Rings
Hard.Tooltip: Cleverly open chests surrounded by fire.

Hard.Label: Momentary Anti-Gravity
Hard.Tooltip: Slide into the corner of a roof to obtain momentary anti-gravity.

Hard.Label: Day 2 Grave Clip
Hard.Tooltip: Get on top of the Day 2 Grave, then slide inside by reading the grave from above. Or simply unload the grave.

Hard.Label: Day 3 Grave Clip
Hard.Tooltip: Ocarina dive into the grave from above, or read the grave from above with extreme precision.

Hard.Label: Leever Hover
Hard.Tooltip: Get into Great Bay Coast early with only a shield.

Hard.Label: Termina Field Boulder Clip
Hard.Tooltip: Get in grottos underneath boulders in Termina Field during a day/night transition.

Hard.Label: Business Scrub Flower Theft
Hard.Tooltip: Damage boost into flowers occupied by business scrubs.

Hard.Label: GBT BK Skip
Hard.Tooltip: Clip out of bounds as Zora and simply swim to the unloaded boss door, or hover there instead.

Very Hard.Label: Bio Baba Hive Luck
Very Hard.Tooltip: Hope the item lands on a lilypad.

Very Hard.Label: Lullaby Skip
Very Hard.Tooltip: Skip playing Goron Lullaby to enter Snowhead Temple using either Goron Spikes or a HESS.

Very Hard.Label: Dog Race Luck
Very Hard.Tooltip: Removes Mask of Truth as a requirement for Dog Race.

Very Hard.Label: WFT Recoil Jump
Very Hard.Tooltip: Jump to WFT 2nd Floor as human with only a bomb and a Bombchu.

Very Hard.Label: Weirdshot Off a Powder Keg Explosion
Very Hard.Tooltip: Exactly as the trick name describes. Try your best to not crash your game trying this!

Very Hard.Label: Recoil Flip Off Enemies
Very Hard.Tooltip: Recoil flip off enemies. Very precise!

Very Hard.Label: Flip Stone Tower Without Light Arrows
Very Hard.Tooltip: Flip Stone Tower by dropping water above the red emblem.

Very Hard.Label: Damage Boosting
Very Hard.Tooltip: Take damage in midair from any source of damage for a small boost.

Very Hard.Label: Enter Secret Shrine Without Light Arrows
Very Hard.Tooltip: Drop water from very high above the sun switch to activate it.

Label: Add Songs
Tooltip: Enable songs being placed among items in the randomization pool.

Label: Randomize Dungeon Entrances
Tooltip:
Enable randomization of dungeon entrances. 

Stone Tower Temple is always vanilla, but Inverted Stone Tower Temple is randomized.

Label: Randomize Boss Rooms
Tooltip: Enable randomization of boss rooms. The boss door texture will match the boss behind the door.

Label: Randomize Enemies
Tooltip: Enable randomization of enemies. May cause softlocks in some circumstances, use at your own risk.

Label: Starting Item Mode
Tooltip:
Select a starting item mode:

None - You will not start with any randomized starting items.
Random - You will start with randomized starting items.
Allow Temporary Items - You will start with randomized starting items including Keg, Magic Bean and Bottles with X.

Values.Label: Doors Open
Values.Tooltip: Small Key doors will always be open. Small Keys in the item pool will be replaced with other items. Other item placement restrictions will apply to the replacements too.

Values.Label: Keep Within Temples
Values.Tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Small Keys into any temple.

Values.Label: Keep Within Area
Values.Tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Small Keys into a location in or near the temple they're used in.

Values.Label: Keep Within Overworld
Values.Tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Small Keys into an overworld location.

Values.Label: Keep Through Time
Values.Tooltip: Small Keys will go back in time with Link. Any used Small Keys will return to Link's inventory.

Values.Label: Doors Open
Values.Tooltip: Boss doors will always be open. Boss Keys in the item pool will be replaced with other items. Other item placement restrictions will apply to the replacements too.

Values.Label: Great Fairy Rewards
Values.Tooltip: Boss Keys will be placed on the reward for collecting 15 stray fairies of their dungeon. Great Fairy Rewards must be randomized for this to take effect.

Values.Label: Keep Within Temples
Values.Tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Keys into any temple.

Values.Label: Keep Within Area
Values.Tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Keys into a location in or near the temple it's used in.

Values.Label: Keep Within Overworld
Values.Tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Keys into an overworld location.

Values.Label: Keep Through Time
Values.Tooltip: Boss Keys will go back in time with Link.

Values.Label: Chests Only
Values.Tooltip: Stray Fairies in the item pool will be replaced with other items. Other item placement restrictions will apply to the replacements too. Non-chest fairies (roaming, bubbles, beehives, etc.) are removed. Chests that ordinarily have a Stray Fairy will behave like normal chests.

Values.Label: Keep Within Temples
Values.Tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Stray Fairies into any temple.

Values.Label: Keep Within Area
Values.Tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Stray Fairies into a location in or near the fairy fountain they originate from.

Values.Label: Keep Within Overworld
Values.Tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Stray Fairies into an overworld location.

Values.Label: Great Fairy Rewards
Values.Tooltip: Boss Remains will be placed on the reward for collecting 15 stray fairies of their dungeon. Great Fairy Rewards must be randomized for this to take effect.

Values.Label: Shuffle Only
Values.Tooltip: Boss Remains will be shuffled among each other. You still need to randomize them in the Item Randomization tab.

Values.Label: Keep Within Temples
Values.Tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Remains into any temple.

Values.Label: Keep Within Area
Values.Tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Remains into a location in or near the temple its boss is in.

Values.Label: Keep Within Overworld
Values.Tooltip: Randomization algorithm will place any randomized Boss Remains into an overworld location.

Values.Label: Blitz1
Values.Tooltip: Start with 1 random boss remains. Locations in and after the temple with that boss will be forced to be junk.

Values.Label: Blitz2
Values.Tooltip: Start with 2 random boss remains. Locations in and after the temples with those bosses will be forced to be junk.

Values.Label: Blitz3
Values.Tooltip: Start with 3 random boss remains. Locations in and after the temples with those bosses will be forced to be junk.

Values.Label: Blitz4
Values.Tooltip: Start with all boss remains. Locations in and after temples will be forced to be junk.

Values.Label: Compass Reveals Boss

Values.Label: Direct To Credits
Values.Tooltip: Once the custom victory condition(s) is/are fulfilled, begin the credits as soon as possible. Otherwise, you must fulfill the condition(s) and then defeat Majora.

Values.Label: Cant Fight Majora
Values.Tooltip: When enabled, speaking to the Moon Child who is wearing Majora's Mask will send you back in time if you haven't fufilled the victory condition(s). When disabled, defeating Majora will send you back in time if you haven't fulfilled the victory condition(s).

Label: Trap Amount
Tooltip: Amount of ice traps to be added to pool by replacing junk items.

Keys.Label: Ice
Keys.Tooltip: Ice traps freeze the player in ice, dealing damage over a few seconds or voiding Zora.

Keys.Label: Bomb
Keys.Tooltip: Bomb traps explode in the player's position, dealing damage and knocking them back.

Keys.Label: Rupoor
Keys.Tooltip: Rupoors take 10 rupees from your wallet.

Label: Trap Appearance
Tooltip: Appearance of ice traps in pool for world models.

Label: Damage Mode
Tooltip:
Select a damage mode, affecting how much damage Link takes:

 - Default: Link takes normal damage.
 - 2x: Link takes double damage.
 - 4x: Link takes quadruple damage.
 - 1-hit KO: Any damage kills Link.
 - Doom: Hardcore mode. Link's hearts are slowly being drained continuously.

Label: Damage Effect
Tooltip:
Select an effect to occur whenever Link is being damaged:

 - Default: Vanilla effects occur.
 - Fire: All damage burns Link.
 - Ice: All damage freezes Link.
 - Shock: All damage shocks link.
 - Knockdown: All damage knocks Link down.
 - Random: Any random effect of the above.

Label: Movement Mode
Tooltip:
Select a movement modifier:

 - Default: No movement modifier.
 - High speed: Link moves at a much higher velocity.
 - Super low gravity: Link can jump very high.
 - Low gravity: Link can jump high.
 - High gravity: Link can barely jump.

Label: Floor Type
Tooltip:
Select a floortype for every floor ingame:

 - Default: Vanilla floortypes.
 - Sand: Link sinks slowly into every floor, affecting movement speed.
 - Ice: Every floor is slippery.
 - Snow: Similar to sand. 
 - Random: Any random floortypes of the above.

Label: Nut and Stick Drops
Tooltip:
Adds Deku nuts and Deku sticks to drop tables in the field:

 - Default: No change, vanilla behavior.
 - Light: one stick and nut 1/16 chance termina bush.
 - Medium: More nuts, twice the chance
 - Extra: More sticks, more nuts, more drop locations.
 - Mayhem: You're crazy in the coconut!

Label: Clock Speed
Tooltip: Modify the speed of time.

Label: Hide Clock
Tooltip: Clock UI will be hidden.

Label: Blast Mask Cooldown
Tooltip: Adjust the cooldown timer after using the Blast Mask.

Label: Enable Suns Song
Tooltip: Enable using the Sun's Song, which speeds up time to 400 units per frame (normal time speed is 3 units per frame) until dawn or dusk or a loading zone.

Label: Allow Fierce Deity Anywhere
Tooltip: Allow the Fierce Deity's Mask to be used anywhere. Also addresses some softlocks caused by Fierce Deity.

Label: Byo Ammo
Tooltip: Arrows, Bombs, and Bombchu will not be provided for minigames. You must bring your own. Logic Modes other than No Logic will account for this.

Label: Death Moon Crash
Tooltip: Dying causes the moon to crash, with all that that implies.

Label: Moon Crash Erases File
Tooltip: If the moon crashes, your save files will be erased.

Label: Hookshot Any Surface
Tooltip: Hookshot can hook to any surface.

Label: Vanilla Moon Trial Access
Tooltip: Entering the trials on the Moon will require masks, as per the vanilla behavior, but this is not considered by logic. Without this enabled, the trials will not require any masks to enter.

Label: General
DefaultValue: BlastMaskThief, BoatArchery, FishermanGame, MilkBarPerformance, HungryGoron, TatlInterrupts, FasterBankText, GoronVillageOwl, AutomaticCredits, PrincessDelivery, SunMask, Tingle, JimRunning, Kotake, HoldAText, EverythingElse

Values.Label: Blast Mask Thief
Values.Tooltip: You don't have to wait for Sakon to leave.

Values.Label: Boat Archery
Values.Tooltip: The minigame will end as soon as you have the required 20 points.

Values.Label: Fisherman Game
Values.Tooltip: The minigame will end as soon as you have the required 20 points.

Values.Label: Milk Bar Performance
Values.Tooltip: Replaying of the music is shortened.

Values.Label: Hungry Goron
Values.Tooltip: The Hungry Goron doesn't interrupt you when you approach, and you don't have to watch him roll away.

Values.Label: Tatl Interrupts
Values.Tooltip: Remove most instances of Tatl interrupting your gameplay.

Values.Label: Faster Bank Text
Values.Tooltip: Skips the irrelevant bank text. Allows using Z/R to set deposit/withdraw amount to min/max.

Values.Label: Goron Village Owl
Values.Tooltip: The owl in Goron Village will no longer trigger dialog when you approach. You must target it and talk to it if you want it to reveal the path.

Values.Label: Automatic Credits
Values.Tooltip: The dialog of the credits will proceed automatically.

Values.Label: Princess Delivery
Values.Tooltip: The cutscene when delivering the Deku Princess will be skipped.

Values.Label: Short Chest Opening
Values.Tooltip: All chests will open using the short animation.

Values.Label: Sun Mask
Values.Tooltip: Shorten various aspects of recovering the Sun Mask.

Values.Label: Tingle
Values.Tooltip: You don't have to watch Tingle fall, and his text is shortened.

Values.Label: Jim Running
Values.Tooltip: You don't have to watch Jim run away after using the Bombers' code.

Values.Label: Kotake
Values.Tooltip: You don't have to watch Kotake fly into the woods, and don't have to watch her fly away after giving you an item.

Values.Label: Hold A Text
Values.Tooltip: Hold A to automatically advance text.

Values.Label: Everything Else
Values.Tooltip: Various cutscenes are skipped or otherwise shortened.

Label: Boss Intros
DefaultValue: Odolwa, Goht, Gyorg, Majora, IgosDuIkana, Gomess

Values.Label: Odolwa
Values.Tooltip: Odolwa is ready to fight you right away.

Values.Label: Goht
Values.Tooltip: Link doesn't look around in surprise when you enter Goht's room.

Values.Label: Gyorg
Values.Tooltip: Gyorg is ready to fight you right away.

Values.Label: Twinmold
Values.Tooltip: Twinmold is ready to fight you right away.

Values.Label: Majora
Values.Tooltip: Majora is ready to fight you right away.

Values.Label: Wart
Values.Tooltip: You don't have to look at Wart to get him down from the ceiling. It spawns on the ground.

Values.Label: Igos Du Ikana
Values.Tooltip: Igos du Ikana and his henchmen are ready to fight you right away.

Values.Label: Gomess
Values.Tooltip: Gomess and his bats are ready to fight you right away.

Label: Quick Text Enabled
Tooltip: Enable quick text. Dialogs are fast-forwarded to choices/end of dialog.

Label: Character
Tooltip: Select a character model to replace Link's default model.

Label: Gossip Hint Style
Tooltip:
Select a Gossip Stone hint style

 - Default: Vanilla Gossip Stone hints.
 - Random: Hints will contain locations of random items.
 - Relevant: Hints will contain locations of items loosely related to the vanilla hint or the area.
 - Competitive: Guaranteed hints about time-consuming checks, and hints regarding importance or non-importance of regions

Label: Garo Hint Style
Tooltip:
Select a Garo hint style

 - Default: Vanilla Garo hints.
 - Random: Hints will contain locations of random items.
 - Relevant: Hints will contain locations of items loosely related to the vanilla hint or the area.
 - Competitive: Guaranteed hints about time-consuming checks, and hints regarding importance or non-importance of regions.

Label: Mix Gossip And Garo Hints
Tooltip: Garo hints distribution and gossip hint distribution will be mixed together.

Label: Free Hints
Tooltip: Enable reading gossip stone hints without requiring the Mask of Truth.

Label: Free Garo Hints
Tooltip: Enable fighting Garos by speaking to Tatl instead of wearing the Garo's Mask.

Label: Clear Hints
Tooltip: Gossip stone hints will give clear item and location names.

Label: Clear Garo Hints
Tooltip: Garo hints will give clear item and location names.

Label: Importance Count
Tooltip: Gossip stone hints that normally give a Way of the Hero hint will instead tell you the number of important items in the region. Foolish hints will say zero important items. Foolish Except The Song hints will say one important song.

Label: Importance Count Garo
Tooltip: Garo hints that normally give a Way of the Hero hint will instead tell you the number of important items in the region. Foolish hints will say zero important items. Foolish Except The Song hints will say one important song.

Label: Tolerant Gossip Stones
Tooltip: The angle at which Gossip Stones can be read will be more tolerant.

Label: Hints Indicate Importance
Tooltip: Location hints indicate the importance of the item.

Label: Override Number Of Required Gossip Hints
Tooltip: Set the number of Way of the Hero hints that will appear on Gossip Stones.

Label: Override Number Of Non Required Gossip Hints
Tooltip: Set the number of Foolish hints that will appear on Gossip Stones.

Label: Override Max Number Of Clock Town Gossip Hints
Tooltip: Set the maximum number of Way of the Hero hints on Gossip Stones that can be for a Clock Town region (including Laundry Pool).

Label: Override Number Of Required Garo Hints
Tooltip: Set the number of Way of the Hero hints that will appear on Garos.

Label: Override Number Of Non Required Garo Hints
Tooltip: Set the number of Foolish hints that will appear on Garos.

Label: Override Max Number Of Clock Town Garo Hints
Tooltip: Set the maximum number of Way of the Hero hints on Garos that can be for a Clock Town region (including Laundry Pool).

Label: Override Hint Priorities
Tooltip: If any locations are provided, this list will be used exclusively for determining hint priorities. Settings are not taken into account, but non-randomized and junked locations will not be hinted. The higher a location appears in this list, the higher its priority. Locations with the same priority will be chosen randomly. If a location should combine with another location, all the combined locations should be added.
