Label: Override Importance Indicator Tiers
Tooltip: Make chosen tiers of hints indicate their importance.

Label: Override Hint Item Caps
Tooltip: The number (if non-zero) indicates how many of the locations in the tier will be hinted, and the rest will be forced to be junk.

Label: Prevent Downgrades
Tooltip: Downgrading items will be prevented.

Label: Update Chests
Tooltip: Chest appearance will be updated to match the item they contain.

Label: Update NPC Text
Tooltip: NPC text that refers to items and their locations will be updated.

Label: Oath Hint
Tooltip:
When you take the boss warp after defeating a temple boss, if you have enough boss remains to go to the moon and do not have Oath to Order then a cutscene will play in which the Giants reveal to you the region where the Oath to Order is located.

If Mix Songs With Items is disabled, they will instead reveal the region of the Powder Keg, Captain's Hat, Mirror Shield, Deku Mask, Goron Mask or Zora Mask, depending on where the Oath to Order is.

Label: Remains Hint
Tooltip: At the entrance to the Clock Tower Interior, Tatl will prompt to speak and will tell you the regions where the Boss Remains are located.

Label: Fairy And Skull Hint
Tooltip:
The cursed man in the Swamp Spider House, and the Green Shirt Man in the Ocean Spider House will tell you the regions of the remaining spider tokens. The Green Shirt Man in the Ocean Spider House will appear there when you blow up the entrance wall.

Each fairy fountain (including Clock Town) will tell you the regions of the remaining Stray Fairies.

Label: Fix Epona Sword
Tooltip:
Change Epona's B button behavior to prevent you from losing your sword if you don't have a bow.
May affect vanilla glitches that use Epona's B button.

Label: Enable Pictobox Subject
Tooltip: Display extra text showing which type of picture was captured by the Pictobox.

Label: Lenient Goron Spikes
Tooltip: Goron spikes can charge midair and keep their charge. Minimum speed for goron spikes is removed.

Label: Keep Quest Trade Through Time
Tooltip: Quest items will return to your inventory after Song of Time.

Label: Speedup Beavers
Tooltip: Modify Beavers to not have to race the younger beaver.

Label: Speedup Dampe
Tooltip: Change Dampe ghost flames to always have two on the ground floor and one up the ladder.

Label: Speedup Dog Race
Tooltip: Make Gold Dog always win if you have the Mask of Truth.

Label: Speedup Lab Fish
Tooltip: Change Lab Fish to only need to be fed one fish.

Label: Speedup Bank
Tooltip: Change the Bank reward thresholds to 200/500/1000 instead of 200/1000/5000. Also reduces maximum bank capacity from 5000 to 1000.

Label: Speedup Baby Cuccos
Tooltip: Makes the location of baby cuccos show on the minimap.

Label: Hearts Selection
Tooltip: Hearts color selection used for HUD color override.

Label: Magic Selection
Tooltip: Magic color selection used for HUD color override.

Label: Shift Hue Misc UI
Tooltip: Shifts the color of miscellaneous UI elements.

Label: Randomize Sounds
Tooltip: Randomize sound effects that are played throughout the game.

Label: Tatl Color Schema
Tooltip: Select a color scheme to replace Tatl's default color scheme.

Label: Music
Tooltip:
Select a music option

 - Default: Vanilla background music.
 - Random: Randomized background music.
 - None: No background music.

Label: Camera Style
Tooltip:
Select a camera style.

 - Default: Vanilla camera.
 - Responsive: Link's movement will always be relative to the direction the camera is facing.
 - Instant: When Z-Targeting to move the camera behind Link, it will do it very quickly. Camera panning when climbing ledges is also sped up.

Label: Enable Hold Z Targeting
Tooltip: Default Z-Targeting style to Hold.

Label: Enable Night BGM
Tooltip:
Enables playing daytime Background music during nighttime in the field.
(Clocktown night music can be weird)

Label: Keep Pictobox Antialiasing
Tooltip: Remove anti-aliasing from the Pictobox pictures, which is what makes Pictobox on emulator so slow.

Label: Low Health Sound
Tooltip:
Select a Low Health SFX setting:

 - Default: Vanilla sound.
 - Disabled: No sound will play.
 - Random: a random SFX will be chosen.
 - Specific SFX: a specific SFX will play as the low health sfx.

Label: Disable Combat Music
Tooltip: Disables combat music around all regular (non boss or miniboss) enemies in the game.

Label: Music Luck Roll Chance
Tooltip:
Music Rando comes with a chance to accept a song from outside of its categories.
 - This controls the percentage chance of a Luck Roll allowing out-of-category music placement
 - This is per specific slot+song check
 - Only songs with their first category being a general category (0-16) are Luck Rollable.

Label: Rainbow Tunic
Tooltip: Link's tunic color will slowly cycle its hue.

Label: Bomb Traps Randomize Tunic Color
Tooltip: When you find a Bomb Trap, Link's tunic will randomly change color.

Label: Remove Minor Music
Tooltip: Minor music such as indoors and grottos will not play. Background music that is already playing will instead continue.

Label: Show Track Name
Tooltip: When a new track starts playing in-game, show the name of the track at the bottom left of the screen.

Label: Disable Fanfares
Tooltip: Replace item fanfares and swamp shooting gallery fanfares with sound effects.

Label: N64 ROM .z64
Tooltip: Output a randomized .z64 ROM that can be loaded into a N64 Emulator.

Label: Wii VC .wad
Tooltip: Output a randomized .WAD file that can be loaded into a Wii Virtual Channel.

Label: Spoiler log .txt
Tooltip:
Output a spoiler log.

 The spoiler log contains a list over all items, and their shuffled locations.
 In addition, the spoiler log contains version information, seed and settings string used in the randomization.

Label: Item Tracker .html
Tooltip:
Output a html spoiler log (Requires spoiler log to be checked).

 Similar to the regular spoiler log, but readable in browsers. The locations/items are hidden by default, and hovering over them will make them visible.

Label: Patch .mmr
Tooltip:
Output a patch file that can be applied using the Patch settings tab to reproduce the same ROM.
Patch file includes all settings except Tunic and Tatl color.
